title: grantProductEntitlements is a stub
body: grant-entitlements.ts exports an async function that is currently a no-op. Its @ai-summary documents this. When the entitlement system is wired up, the stub should be replaced with the actual grant logic and the @ai-summary updated to reflect the real behaviour.
rationale: Payment completions will silently not grant entitlements until this is implemented — checkout will succeed but users won't get access.
